title: hieracium racemosum subsp. provinciale
intro: Hieracium racemosum subsp. provinciale, also known as Hieracium provinciale, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat gastrointestinal issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hieracium racemosum subsp. provinciale include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and teas, and can be found in some traditional European herbal remedies.
